entry.title: 2024march1
entry.content:
心理状态belike:

今天又遇到了经典的美国龟速校园网，直接给我服务器卡掉线了还行……写完了151project的checkoff1,有点无语的是，周四第一次 git project是lab的仓库，昨天git成功但是做着做着发现TA给的testbench不太对……

最近循环听AI孙燕姿，一听就听一天。很好音乐🎵，使我精力充沛😄👍。我强烈推荐这一首，调音非常好。

但是事情也是真多啊….. 春假打算好好补补所有的进度。Good luck!

entry.title: 2024new
entry.content:
I finally got straight A+ in 23 fall…. ;) It was not easy for me, I am not a great test taker… My favorite course, CS:APP, I was just A-.

I had arrived at Berkeley and was busy with course selection and various other matters. In addition, I was also looking for research. I was very, very busy. I took EECS151, EECS151LA, EE140 and MSE243. These are very challenging and I hope to have a good result.

顺带一提，数据结构，CSAPP，计组和EDA的资料整理又得延后了，或许会在这学期结束后和UCB的EECS151&EE140一起整理发布出来。

不是，我为什么要来这边上数集模集啊，HY往培养计划里塞这么多必修的是不是有那个大病啊？沟槽的151workload，沟槽的140hw，沟槽的培养方案😭😭😭

entry.title: 2023final
entry.content:
You are welcome to cite my ECG conference articles. Articles from IEEE Sensors Journal have also been accepted and are waiting for publication.

I have been very busy recently looking for Berkeley research groups and final review & papers. I will publish another MIA in the near future(Lei’s group), about feature extract processing of large models in medical image processing. I will go to UCB for a semester as an visiting student after January 16th. I hope everything goes well.

最近忙于寻求Berkeley的课题组和期末复习＆论文，非常忙，近期我正在努力向MIA靠拢，关于医学图像处理方面，大模型的feature extract处理。1月16日后我会前往UCB交换一学期，希望一切顺利。

entry.title: davis3
entry.content:
Two months flies, it is difficult to make a summary of the summer of 2023. When I pulled a suitcase to sit alone on the plane on the other side of the ocean, I never thought that the life of UC Davis was like this. From surprise to dull, from tension to soothing, not only research, but also life.

The whole project is mainly cooperating with Shing-Jiuan. She also takes care of my research very much. We often have a discussion of one or two hours. Sometimes she can’t figure out the problems and grabbed her hair, it really looked like my sister. Then I met Zixiao and Yifei in the gym, and was astonished by Yifei’s badminton. Before leaving, I was familiar with Kangning who was very good. He treated me at Black Bear and took me home after my bicycle was broken. He discussed some future direction issues with me in his spare time. I was surprised that he was a senior doctor who had undergone lots scientific researchs, and he had to bring his little daughter under the pressure of study and work. I sincerely wish him good. Regarding professor, if let me describe Professor Yang, I prefer to use the word ‘Strict’. His strictness is not a kind of attitude towards research. At the graduation dinner of Junjie, the professor asked me what the biggest feeling was. I said there are few professors who will meet with you for two hours in private. They are very busy. Professor Yang said “It depends”.

Luck is not very good. I encountered a lot of trouble when I went abroad for the first time, and it was just the beginning. Luck is very good. The people they meet are very nice. The roommates are people who get along well. Labmates are good researchers.

It is difficult to give the next perfect definition to the two -month journey. What I think of it may be growth.

I will always miss this summer.

2023夏的戴维斯，安静平和的小镇。

entry.title: davis2
entry.content:
What makes me strange is that people here seem to use matlab, don’t know much about python format, and even jupyter code is not familiar… This forces me to go back to learn matlab syntax, but I also think this is really useful of.

慢慢地跑一些Monte Carlo模拟，这里的空调真舒服~

entry.title: davis1
entry.content:
It is very common that I rush to make PPT before the group meeting… To be honest, I still like the life here in Davis, it is very peaceful and beautiful, and people are very friendly. But because of my personality, I always like to plan and think about many things, which doesn’t seem to fit well with the quiet pastoral life… If possible, I still hope to live here forever.

And one more thing is, MY SPEAKING IS SO BAD…XD

如果能重来，我要好好学口语~

entry.title: plan
entry.content:
My computer mainboard burnt out, and there was no place for repairs in Davis. I had no choice but to buy another laptop here. Most of my files can be recovered, but I lost my previous blog files, and the backup was on my lab computer. I won’t be able to go back for two months, so I plan to rebuild my blog.😔

Next, I will continue to update this blog, including the notes on CSAPP and Data structures that I have been wanting to update since last year, as well as the notes on Computer Organization and Design for this semester. Afterward, I will focus on research and applying for a Ph.D. program in ECE in the United States.

entry.title: world!
entry.content: Hello! This is Yu Li, a student from WHU and attempting to explore more!
